Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

HAS healthcheck is failing due to python 3.8.2 update. A supporting library has to be updated(libressl-dev --> openssl-dev)

Not sure why OSDF healthcheck fails. Healthcheck passes while sending request manually. If content type is added, the healthcheck is failing.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> HAS healthcheck is failing due to python 3.8.2 update. A supporting library has to be updated(libressl-dev --> openssl-dev)
> 
> Not sure why OSDF healthcheck fails. Healthcheck passes while sending request manually. If content type is added, the healthcheck is failing.

Patch Set 1:

@Morgan,

OSDF healthcheck is sending "content-type" for a get request which is throwing 400. OSDF healthceck was implemented from the SNIRO simulator(A placeholder for OOF in one of the early releases). I guess it is time that we rename the healthcheck name to OOF and request format. Is it okay to do so it in the testsuite?

Please let me know your views.
Uploaded patch set 2.

we got the same error
however the docker has been regenerated 
I made a test
docker run -it nexus3.onap.org:10003/onap/xtesting-healthcheck:master sh

# cat /var/opt/ONAP/robot/resources/oof_interface.robot 
*** Settings ***
Documentation     The main interface for interacting with OOF: OSDF and Homing Service
.........

*** Variables ***
${OOF_HOMING_HEALTH_CHECK_PATH}       /v1/plans/healthcheck
${OOF_OSDF_HEALTH_CHECK_PATH}        /api/oof/v1/healthcheck
${OOF_CMSO_HEALTH_CHECK_PATH}        /cmso/v1/health?checkInterfaces=true

${OOF_CMSO_TEMPLATE_FOLDER}   cmso

I can see it is correct (OSDF replaces SNIRO), it includes your change
But I do not know if this image was the one used for the test...it should be the case

Can you check the age of the image which you used locally. I can see from nexus that the nexus3.onap.org:10003/onap/xtesting-healthcheck:master has been updated 3 hours ago.
